response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack experience, including recent TypeScript/Node.js product work, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and directly relevant AI-agent development (MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling). His deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, testing workshops) and polyglot background map well to the role's engineering and quality expectations. Gaps are mostly nominal: Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin are not explicitly evidenced, and an unexplained ~8-month employment gap in 2020 is worth a question, but none of these outweigh the strong overall fit.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS work matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic-workflow frameworks) — an explicitly required and rare skill
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and Vitest/Playwright are not named despite the strong general testing background
Kotlin and Python are absent; polyglot depth leans toward niche languages like D rather than the JD's secondary stack
Unexplained ~8-month employment gap between January 2020 and September 2020

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency of TypeScript/Node fullstack experience
